name: MẬP MAP

abilities.name: Guardian of Knowledge
abilities.text: This model receives a (+) to Df duels while it has an Insight token.

abilities.name: Laugh Off
abilities.text: If this model would be moved from an enemy model's effect, it may discard a card to choose not to.

abilities.name: Library Escort
abilities.text: During the end phase, this model may move up to 4" toward a non-Story Red Library model in LoS.

actions.name: Bored to Death
actions.effects: If the target has no cards in its control hand, this action deals +1 damage.

triggers.name: Clarity
triggers.text: This model gains an Insight token.

triggers.name: Duality
triggers.text: Enemy only. This model must choose: both players draw a card or both players discard a card.

triggers.name: Lie Down and Nap
triggers.text: This model heals 1, draws a card, and ends its activation.

actions.name: Reshelve This
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Allied minion only. Target declares an action.

triggers.name: Lie Down and Nap
triggers.text: This model heals 1, draws a card, and ends its activation.

actions.name: Helped by Booklights
actions.effects: Remove a token from the target. This model gains an Insight token.

triggers.name: Booklight Glow
triggers.text: Friendly models within (t) 4" gain a Shielded token.

triggers.name: Thorough Research
triggers.text: Target gains either an Insight or Adaptable token.

extraction_notes: Name contains special character 'Ậ' - preserved as shown on card
